title: Xanthic Herbal Australian Fennel Wrap
description: A Whole30-friendly Australian dish featuring fennel seeds, designed to cure hangovers, wrapped in a pandan leaf wrap. This herbal and shaggy wrap is perfect for a snack or lunch.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together the toasted fennel seeds, melted coconut oil, sliced onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger.
Add the sliced grass fed beef to the bowl and toss to coat with the fennel seed mixture.
Season the beef with sea salt.
Grill the beef for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, prepare the pandan leaves by rinsing them in cold water and patting them dry with paper towels.
To assemble the wraps, place a few slices of the grilled beef onto the center of a pandan leaf.
Spoon some of the fennel seed mixture over the top of the beef.
Fold the bottom edge of the pandan leaf up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
Serve the wraps immediately, garnished with additional toasted fennel seeds if desired.
